summary: Lead closes M6-SCENARIO-DATA-PIPELINE-001 after PR #135 entered origin/main at 7f83cd4da1dcd7fdc77be922225bef43c9127c74. The accepted M6 Alpha scenario data pipeline is now integrated; next READY M6 tasks are M6-MAP-CANDIDATE-PIPELINE-001 and M6-SUCCESSION-COMPLETION-001.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke PASS; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact PASS.
Merged PR #135 into main and deleted remote feature branch.

tests_run.command: git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/main

decisions: Mark M6-SCENARIO-DATA-PIPELINE-001 CLOSED only after accepted implementation entered origin/main.
Continue M6 autonomous execution with next READY tasks from taskctl: M6-MAP-CANDIDATE-PIPELINE-001 and M6-SUCCESSION-COMPLETION-001.

Next READY tasks touch different domains; lead must re-check allowed/forbidden paths before starting either.
requested_action: Integrate this closure PR, sync main, then start the highest-priority READY M6 task.
